nasb.text: But Moses said, “Why then are you transgressing the commandment of the Lord, when it will not succeed?

esv.text: But Moses said, “Why now are you transgressing the command of the Lord, when that will not succeed?

cnv.text: 摩西說：“你們為甚麼又違背耶和華的命令呢？這事必不能成功。

ccb.text: 摩西说：“你们为什么要违背耶和华的命令？你们不会成功的。
